penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating technique rather than a timed performance attempt.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows instructional content with text overlays explaining the 'dancing needle' technique and practice exercises. There is no clear start/end timing for an official FLS task attempt. The frames show demonstration of needle loading and basic suturing motions in a practice context, but no complete task performance with timing markers. This is educational content rather than a scoreable performance.
